headlines.title: ‘We should be partners, not rivals’: Chinese President Xi Jinping opens bilateral talks
headlines.description: President Xi Jinping opened the bilateral talks with President Trump by emphasizing that a stable bilateral relationship benefits the world and stating, “We should be partners, not rivals.”

headlines.title: Inside China’s push for more marriages and children
headlines.description: The one child policy has left a lasting impact on Chinese society, where marriage and birth rates are both very low. That’s why the Chinese government is now instituting programs to encourage people to have children and get married. NBC News’ Janis Mackey Frayer has the story.

headlines.title: Tom Llamas reports from the Great Wall as it’s restored one brick at a time
headlines.description: BEIJING — Old Cheng was waiting patiently at the bottom of a steep mountain ridge as the minivans carrying our news team snaked their way through the Yan mountains to meet him.

headlines.title: A judge told Musk he wasn’t excused from trial. He went to China with Trump anyway.
headlines.description: Elon Musk traveled to China with President Donald Trump, despite the trial over his lawsuit with OpenAI and a judge’s order that he remain ready to be recalled.

headlines.title: Trump to Xi: Trade will be 'totally reciprocal'
headlines.description: President Donald Trump makes opening remarks celebrating the U.S.-China relationship as bilateral talks begin.

headlines.title: Trump and Xi shake hands ahead of bilateral talks
headlines.description: President Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping shake hands, participating in a ceremony at the Great Hall of the People ahead of their bilateral talks.

headlines.title: Children greet President Trump in Beijing
headlines.description: Children outside of the Great Hall of the People in Beijing greet President Trump ahead of bilateral talks with Chinese President Xi.

headlines.title: How will Trump's China trip differ from his 2017 visit?
headlines.description: How will Trump's China trip differ from his 2017 visit?

headlines.title: Trump arrives in China for Xi summit
headlines.description: Air Force One landed at Beijing Capital International Airport in China. Trump’s state visit includes a bilateral meeting with Chinese President Xi Jinping. He is the first U.S. president to visit China since his last state visit in 2017 during his first term.

headlines.title: Here's what's on Trump's to-do list in China
headlines.description: Here's what's on Trump's to-do list in China

headlines.title: Will Trump discuss the war with Iran with Xi?
headlines.description: Will Trump discuss the war with Iran with Xi?

headlines.title: Trump says he plans to have 'long talk' with Xi about Iran
headlines.description: Speaking to reporters as he left the White House for his trip to China this afternoon, President Trump laid out his plan to discuss the Iran war with Chinese President Xi Jinping.
